overview: This insect appears to be a Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons), a species endemic to Southern Africa. It is a grasshopper characterized by distinct yellow bands across a lavender-grey body and striking yellow eyes. These insects are commonly found in the sandy soil and vegetation of the region. iNaturalist +1 2 sites Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons) · iNaturalist Psychedelic Forbhopper (Thericles obtusifrons) · iNaturalist.
